name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F and bake the potatoes until fork tender (approximately 1 hour).
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan. Slowly blend flour with a wire whisk until thoroughly blended, forming a roux.
3. Gradually add milk to the butter-flour mixture, whisking constantly. Whisk in salt and pepper, then simmer over low heat, stirring constantly.
4. Cut potatoes in half and scoop out the flesh, setting aside.
5. Chop half of the potato peels and discard the remainder.
6. When the milk mixture is very hot, whisk in the potato flesh.
7. Add green onions and potato peels, whisking well.
8. Add sour cream and heat thoroughly.
9. Gradually add grated cheddar cheese until all is melted and incorporated.
10. Serve and top with crumbled bacon.
